use_cases: User profile and account settings menu in SaaS applications
Expandable navigation menu for desktop interfaces and dashboards
Quick action menus with smooth animations for modern web apps
ai_summary: A smooth animated dropdown menu component with fluid open/close transitions using motion/react. Features include click-outside-to-close functionality, hover state tracking, animated width/height/border-radius transitions, and icon support via Hugeicons. Designed for user menus, settings, and profile dropdowns in modern SaaS and developer tool interfaces.
